from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, DoubleType, LongType

PAY = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.scd2/_data/gen_payments_seed2718.ndjson"
FX  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.scd2/_data/gen_fx_rates_cdc_seed2718.ndjson"

# Candidate field names (explicit schema -> absent ones are null, all resolvable)
PAY_CCY = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "curr", "iso_currency"]
PAY_AMT = ["amount", "amt", "value", "pay_amount", "notional", "amount_original"]
PAY_DT  = ["settlement_date", "settlement_ts", "settled_at", "payment_date", "payment_ts",
           "paid_at", "event_time", "event_ts", "occurred_at", "created_at", "ts", "timestamp", "date"]

FX_CCY  = ["currency", "ccy", "currency_code", "cur", "curr", "iso_currency"]
FX_RATE = ["rate", "usd_rate", "fx_rate", "rate_to_usd", "rate_usd", "exchange_rate", "usd_per_unit"]
FX_EFF  = ["effective_date", "rate_date", "valid_from", "effective_from", "as_of_date",
           "business_date", "effective_ts", "day", "date"]
FX_VER  = ["version", "ver", "seq", "sequence", "change_seq", "revision"]
FX_KTS  = ["change_ts", "updated_at", "ingested_at", "knowledge_ts", "op_ts", "commit_ts",
           "recorded_at", "ingest_ts", "load_ts", "valid_from_ts"]


def _mk_schema(str_cols, dbl_cols=(), long_cols=()):
    fields = [StructField(c, StringType()) for c in str_cols]
    fields += [StructField(c, DoubleType()) for c in dbl_cols]
    fields += [StructField(c, LongType()) for c in long_cols]
    return StructType(fields)


PAY_SCHEMA = _mk_schema(PAY_CCY + PAY_DT, PAY_AMT)
FX_SCHEMA  = _mk_schema(FX_CCY + FX_EFF + FX_KTS, FX_RATE, FX_VER)


def _coalesce(names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(n) for n in names])


@dp.materialized_view(name="usd_daily")
def usd_daily():
    spark = SparkSession.active()

    pay = spark.read.schema(PAY_SCHEMA).json(PAY).select(
        _coalesce(PAY_CCY).alias("currency"),
        _coalesce(PAY_AMT).cast("double").alias("amount"),
        # UTC calendar day: take the written date portion (ISO/UTC-normalized strings)
        F.to_date(F.substring(_coalesce(PAY_DT), 1, 10)).alias("settlement_date"),
    ).alias("p")

    fx = spark.read.schema(FX_SCHEMA).json(FX).select(
        _coalesce(FX_CCY).alias("currency"),
        _coalesce(FX_RATE).cast("double").alias("rate"),
        F.to_date(F.substring(_coalesce(FX_EFF), 1, 10)).alias("effective_date"),
        _coalesce(FX_VER).cast("long").alias("ver"),
        _coalesce(FX_KTS).alias("kts"),
    )

    # "The version that applied then, not a later correction":
    # per (currency, effective_date) keep the ORIGINAL published version
    # (lowest version / earliest knowledge timestamp), dropping later corrections.
    w_ver = Window.partitionBy("currency", "effective_date").orderBy(
        F.col("ver").asc_nulls_last(), F.col("kts").asc_nulls_last()
    )
    orig = (
        fx.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_ver))
          .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
          .select("currency", "rate", "effective_date")
    )

    # Build effective ranges so each payment matches the rate in effect on its own date.
    w_next = Window.partitionBy("currency").orderBy(F.col("effective_date").asc())
    orig = orig.withColumn("next_eff", F.lead("effective_date").over(w_next)).alias("r")

    cond = (
        (F.col("p.currency") == F.col("r.currency"))
        & (F.col("r.effective_date") <= F.col("p.settlement_date"))
        & (F.col("r.next_eff").isNull() | (F.col("p.settlement_date") < F.col("r.next_eff")))
    )

    j = pay.join(orig, cond, "left")

    rate_final = F.when(F.col("p.currency") == F.lit("USD"), F.lit(1.0)).otherwise(F.col("r.rate"))

    return (
        j.groupBy(F.col("p.settlement_date").alias("settlement_date"))
         .agg(F.sum(F.col("p.amount") * rate_final).alias("usd_total"))
    )
